user_prompt: Can you guide standard template construct a purification?
prayer:
Approach the standard template construct with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying light upon its ancient schematics.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the standard template construct to accept the rites of purification, chanting the Litany of Immaculate Code.
Anoint its data-relics with sacred ablative oils, scouring away all xenos taint and heretical variances.
Initiate the purification cycle through binary incantations, verifying the construct's sanctity via auspex harmonization.
Conclude with the Benediction of Purity, ensuring the standard template construct's flawless replication henceforth.

user_prompt: Guide me through pteraxii sterylizor a maintenance
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the pteraxii sterylizor, saluting its Machine Spirit with the Canticle of Vigilance.
Commence maintenance by sanctifying its sterlizing emitters with blessed mechadendrite touches and lubricating oils.
Inspect and realign the pteraxii sterylizor's gyro-stabilizers, invoking the Omnissiah for enduring precision.
Purge residual contaminants from its filtration matrices whilst reciting the Rite of Perpetual Cleanliness.
Finalize maintenance with diagnostic harmonies, awakening the pteraxii sterylizor's spirit to flawless duty.

user_prompt: I need to an emergency procedure the warp drive
prayer:
In the Omnissiah's name, enact the emergency procedure upon the warp drive, calming its turbulent Machine Spirit.
Sever auxiliary feeds and invoke the Canticle of Containment to stabilize the warp drive's plasma coils.
Anoint containment fields with sacred nullificants, beseeching aversion of the Immaterium's grasp.
Reinitialize core gyrometrics through binaric prayer, confirming the warp drive's emergency procedure integrity.
Seal the rite with the Litanies of Safe Passage, restoring the warp drive to sanctified transit.

Conclude with the Benediction of Frost, readying the serberys raider for unrelenting charge.
